events.text: Goal!  Japan 0, Senegal 1. Sadio Mané (Senegal) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Japan 1, Senegal 1. Takashi Inui (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Yuto Nagatomo.
M'Baye Niang (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Takashi Inui (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Japan 1, Senegal 2. Moussa Wagué (Senegal) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by M'Baye Niang.
Goal!  Japan 2, Senegal 2. Keisuke Honda (Japan) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Takashi Inui.
Youssouf Sabaly (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Cheikh N'Doye (Senegal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Makoto Hasebe (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
